title: roulinia ligulata
intro: Roulinia ligulata, also known as the "Golden Trumpet Vine", is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of Roulinia ligulata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
